# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACTS_TTL: "30 days"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - mkdir -p build/artifacts
    - echo "Building binary..." > build/artifacts/app-binary
    - echo "Building config..." > build/artifacts/app-config
    - echo "Building docs..." > build/artifacts/app-docs
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/artifacts/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACTS_TTL
    reports:
      junit: build/test-results.xml

deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la build/artifacts/
    - echo "Executing deployment..."
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com

deploy-production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la build/artifacts/
    - echo "Executing production deployment..."
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
